## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss SEO recovery, content strategy, and outbound campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/d8X8x4EyojzRxC1bfHd2WMtfyGyfseRd?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO recovery underway after 404 issues; 315 articles published, 85 more planned](https://fathom.video/share/d8X8x4EyojzRxC1bfHd2WMtfyGyfseRd?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Podcast outreach campaign yielding quality leads; focus on expanding this approach](https://fathom.video/share/d8X8x4EyojzRxC1bfHd2WMtfyGyfseRd?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [New content topic: AI regulations for financial advisors (RAGSP, upcoming AI bill)](https://fathom.video/share/d8X8x4EyojzRxC1bfHd2WMtfyGyfseRd?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Exploring high-quality financial advisor database (Advisor Pro) for targeted outreach](https://fathom.video/share/d8X8x4EyojzRxC1bfHd2WMtfyGyfseRd?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

## Topics

### SEO Recovery Status

  - [Articles starting to be indexed again after 404 issues](https://fathom.video/share/d8X8x4EyojzRxC1bfHd2WMtfyGyfseRd?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Google Console shows increasing index numbers](https://fathom.video/share/d8X8x4EyojzRxC1bfHd2WMtfyGyfseRd?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [315 articles published; 85 more planned (AI note-taker comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/d8X8x4EyojzRxC1bfHd2WMtfyGyfseRd?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Long-term impact uncertain; next 2 weeks critical for repositioning](https://fathom.video/share/d8X8x4EyojzRxC1bfHd2WMtfyGyfseRd?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Strategy
